title: The Mystery of the Haunted Portrait

scenes.text: A legendary portrait vanished, sparking ghostly tales of sorrow.
It happened in Edinburgh, at the Scottish National Gallery.
In 2009, an iconic portrait mysteriously disappeared during a gallery exhibition.
The gallery remains haunted by the loss of the artwork.
Despite investigations, the portrait has never been recovered.
scenes.label: NEVER RECOVERED

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Edinburgh, Scotland - 2009. An iconic portrait vanished during an exhibition, leaving tales of hauntings in its wake. Follow for daily cold cases!
